trained_on: original families only (new-family rows excluded from prm_samples_train)
oracle_labels_from: canonical seed-gate oracle (same oracle labels train + new families)
note: Pairwise/rank accuracy on the oracle-labeled subset of the NEW families, with a PRM that trained on the original families only. Compare against the in-distribution oracle-subset pairwise (~0.94) and the majority floor. A large drop = the new chain TOPOLOGIES are genuinely out of the PRM's structural coverage (more families would help); near-parity = the PRM already generalizes structurally.
